phrases.intent_en: Ask where the black pottery counters are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os balcões de cerâmica preta?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH bahl-KOHNYSH DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh PREH-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Barro preto is a traditional Azorean pottery style, often sold along historic shopping streets.

likely_response.translation_en: Next to the lead soldier displays.

responses.english: Next to the lead soldier displays.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic shopfront arches are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os arcos históricos das fachadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH AH-ruh-koosh eesh-TAW-ree-koosh DUHSH fuh-SHAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The arches reflect nineteenth-century Portuguese commercial architecture common in Azorean towns.

likely_response.local: Siga para o trecho pedonal de paralelepípedos onde estão os arcos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh PUH-ruh AW TREH-shoo peh-doo-NAHL DIH puh-ruh-leh-lih-PEE-pih-doosh OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH AH-ruh-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow to the cobblestone pedestrian stretch where the arches are.

responses.english: Follow to the cobblestone pedestrian stretch where the arches are.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh PUH-ruh AW TREH-shoo peh-doo-NAHL DIH puh-ruh-leh-lih-PEE-pih-doosh OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH AH-ruh-koosh.
responses.local: Siga para o trecho pedonal de paralelepípedos onde estão os arcos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Azores pineapple shops are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as lojas de ananás dos Açores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-deh esh-TAHN ahsh LOH-zhahsh deh ah-nah-NAHSH dooz ah-SOH-reesh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ananás dos Açores is a protected designation; these shops are a highlight for visitors.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic shopfront arches are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os arcos históricos das lojas da Rua d'El-Rei?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH AH-ruh-koosh eesh-TAW-ree-koosh DUHSH LOH-zhuhsh DUH ROOUH DEHL-RAY?
phrases.cultural_note: These arches are characteristic of the street's historic architecture.

likely_response.local: Nas fachadas ao longo da calçada de paralelepípedos.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUHSH fuh-SHAH-duhsh OW LOHNG-goo DUH kahl-SAH-duh DIH puh-ruh-leh-lih-PEE-pih-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: On the facades along the cobblestone pedestrian stretch.

responses.english: On the facades along the cobblestone pedestrian stretch.
responses.phonetic: NUHSH fuh-SHAH-duhsh OW LOHNG-goo DUH kahl-SAH-duh DIH puh-ruh-leh-lih-PEE-pih-doosh.
responses.local: Nas fachadas ao longo da calçada de paralelepípedos.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar ananás dos Açores para comprar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR uh-nahn-NAHSH DOOSH uh-SOH-rihsh PUH-ruh koomp-RAHR?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor ou artesão nas lojas com exposição de ananases. Eles indicam-lhe onde estão à venda.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR OHW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh KOHM ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH uh-nuh-NAH-zihsh. EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng-LYIH OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN AH VAYNG-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a sales assistant or artisan at the shops that display pineapples. They will point you to where they are sold.

responses.english: Ask a sales assistant or artisan at the shops that display pineapples. They will point you to where they are sold.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR OHW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh KOHM ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH uh-nuh-NAH-zihsh. EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng-LYIH OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN AH VAYNG-duh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um vendedor ou artesão nas lojas com exposição de ananases. Eles indicam-lhe onde estão à venda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the black pottery counters are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os balcões de barro preto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH bahl-KOHNYSH DIH BAH-roo PREH-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Barro preto is a traditional Azorean black pottery; visitors often seek it out along the pedestrian stretch.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver as exibições de bonecos de chumbo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR UHSH eh-zee-bee-SOHNYSH DIH boo-NEH-koosh DIH SHOONM-boo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor na loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH LAW-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a sales assistant in the store.

responses.english: Ask a sales assistant in the store.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH LAW-zhuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um vendedor na loja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lead figurine displays are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver os bonecos de chumbo expostos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR OOSH boo-NEH-koosh DIH SHOONM-boo ehsh-PAWS-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bonecos de chumbo are traditional Azorean lead figurines depicting daily life and folklore.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao artesão na loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN NUH LAW-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sales assistant or the artisan in the shop.

responses.english: Ask the sales assistant or the artisan in the shop.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN NUH LAW-zhuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao artesão na loja.
